movies.overview: When a Category 5 hurricane decimates a coastal town, the storm surge brings devastation, chaos, and something far more frightening onto shore: hungry sharks.
movies.tagline: If the flood doesn't kill you...
movies.title: Thrash

movies.overview: When an unexpected road rage incident puts his son in critical condition, an enraged father spirals down a dark path of emotional turmoil and vengeance.

Michel and Cathy, wed for longer than they can remember, lead a quiet but monotonous life in the mountains. When a bear bursts out in front of Michel’s car, accidentally killing two drug dealers and revealing a €2 million loot in the process, their life takes an unpredictable turn, especially when they decide to cover up the incident and keep the money! But their plan leads them to stumble upon an unexplained trail of dead bodies. More used to being honest than crooked, Michel and Cathy’s clumsy cover-up efforts soon put an interfering inspector hot on their trail.
movies.title: How to Make a Killing

movies.overview: Four adopted brothers return to their Detroit hometown when their mother is murdered and vow to exact revenge on the killers.
movies.tagline: They came home to bury mom... and her killer
movies.title: Four Brothers

movies.overview: With his marriage fraying, Blake persuades his wife Charlotte to take a break from the city and visit his remote childhood home in rural Oregon. As they arrive at the farmhouse in the dead of night, they're attacked by an unseen animal and barricade themselves inside the home as the creature prowls the perimeter. But as the night stretches on, Blake begins to behave strangely, transforming into something unrecognizable.
movies.title: Wolf Man

movies.overview: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.
movies.tagline: Live and Fight. Survive and Resist.
movies.title: Godzilla Minus One

movies.overview: A man who lost his family in the September 11 attack on New York City runs into his old college roommate. Rekindling the friendship is the one thing that appears able to help the man recover from his grief.
movies.title: Reign Over Me

movies.overview: On the brink of losing her childhood home, Maddie discovers an intriguing job listing: wealthy helicopter parents looking for someone to “date” their introverted 19-year-old son, Percy, before he leaves for college. To her surprise, Maddie soon discovers the awkward Percy is no sure thing.
movies.title: No Hard Feelings

movies.overview: The daily lives of Sami and Nada. While Nada is the self-proclaimed "biggest hoodlum on the boardwalk", Sami is discovering the prison world for the first time. But in prison, no one is who they say they are, and it's not long before the masks fall off
movies.title: Sous écrous

movies.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.
movies.tagline: They sing. They dance. They battle demons.
movies.title: KPop Demon Hunters

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: As news of the shooting makes headlines, police scrutiny intensifies. With his family on the line, Kylian feels there is no right choice left to make.

tv_shows.name: Bandi
tv_shows.overview: Following the death of their mother, their pillar of strength and their anchor, eleven siblings aged 7 to 23 try to stay united in the face of adversity. But for some of them, drug trafficking seems to be the only way to survive. A decision far from being unanimously accepted, and one that severely tests the strength of their family bonds.

last_episode_to_air.name: As Time Goes By
last_episode_to_air.overview: As Fiona finds new security, a fatal decision changes her relationship with Thony forever.

tv_shows.name: The Cleaning Lady
tv_shows.overview: A whip-smart doctor comes to the U.S. for a medical treatment to save her ailing son. But when the system fails and pushes her into hiding, she refuses to be beaten down and marginalized. Instead, she becomes a cleaning lady for the mob and starts playing the game by her own rules.

last_episode_to_air.name: FLYING ALONE for the First Time
last_episode_to_air.overview: Salish thinks she's taking her first-ever solo flight. But she doesn't know Jordan will be secretly following her - and wearing an extreme disguise.

tv_shows.name: Salish & Jordan Matter
tv_shows.overview: Follow father and daughter Jordan and Salish through wild situations and extreme challenges in this compilation of classic family moments.

last_episode_to_air.name: It's All Fake
last_episode_to_air.overview: The search for Eva continues, and so do Ángela's schemes. An arrest gives Indira a wealth of information, and a special show has a terrible fallout.

tv_shows.name: Fake Profile
tv_shows.overview: Camila meets her Prince Charming through a dating app. After an idyllic romance, she plans to surprise him — only to end up trapped in a false paradise.

seasons.name: Killer Match
seasons.overview: Determined to break Miguel's hold on her, Camila starts a new life with David. But a string of mysterious murders threatens to destroy their relationship.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: While teaming up to search Fontana's estate, Lidia and Jacopo unearth a vital clue they hope will alter the outcome of Grazia's landmark case.

tv_shows.name: The Law According to Lidia Poët
tv_shows.overview: In late 19th-century Turin, the young Lidia Poët, fights against everything and everyone to get what is rightfully hers: to be enrolled in the official register of lawyers. A profession, at the time, reserved exclusively for men. Nevertheless, nothing could stop her dream of becoming the first female lawyer in Italy.

last_episode_to_air.name: Who Said I Was Finished?
last_episode_to_air.overview: Ronaldinho returns to Brazil to achieve a final goal in his career and reconnect with his roots. He finds unprecedented support during difficult times.

tv_shows.name: Ronaldinho: The One and Only
tv_shows.overview: This series follows the life and career of Brazilian soccer star Ronaldinho, tracing his journey from young prodigy to global sports icon.

last_episode_to_air.name: I See That Girl in Third Person
last_episode_to_air.overview: A dramatic raid puts Sam behind bars, where he orchestrates a brazen kidnapping. With Christine's support, his ex-followers begin to rebuild their lives.

tv_shows.name: Trust Me: The False Prophet
tv_shows.overview: Chronicles the rise of Samuel Bateman, the self-proclaimed heir to Warren Jeffs’ Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints (FLDS), through the eyes of one couple who infiltrated his inner circle.

last_episode_to_air.name: Wish List
last_episode_to_air.overview: The KISS crew navigates old flames, new prospects and second chances as they gather to celebrate Kitty's 18th birthday.

tv_shows.name: XO, Kitty
tv_shows.overview: Teen matchmaker Kitty Song Covey thinks she knows everything there is to know about love. But when she moves halfway across the world to reunite with her long-distance boyfriend, she'll soon realise that relationships are a lot more complicated when it's your heart on the line.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A new love story unfolds when teen matchmaker Kitty reunites with her long-distance boyfriend at the same Seoul high school attended by her late mother.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Kitty returns to Seoul ready for a fresh start, but her plan for a drama-free semester fizzles fast amid new faces, messy crushes and family secrets.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Kitty returns for her final year at KISS with her perfect senior year mapped out. She’s going to make meaningful memories with her friends, grow closer to her relatives in Korea, and make big decisions about her future. And, she’s going to define her relationship with Min Ho. For real this time. But when surprise revelations derail her plans and relationships, Kitty will have to learn to embrace the unexpected.

tv_shows.tagline: Time for some more Seoul searching.
